scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ./.env.local ] && . ./.env.local; set +a; pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build'
scripts.verify:internal-beta: pnpm run preflight:beta-secrets && pnpm --dir lib/api-spec codegen && pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/admin.test.mjs tests/routes/ai.test.mjs tests/routes/workouts.test.mjs tests/routes/profiles.test.mjs tests/routes/classes.test.mjs && pnpm run build && CI=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/admin-api-smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts tests/e2e/member-flows.spec.ts
scripts.dev:api: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env.local; set +a; PORT=${PORT:-4000}; export PORT; pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev'
scripts.dev:admin: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env.local; set +a; PORT=${PORT:-4173}; BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/admin/}; VITE_API_BASE_URL=${VITE_API_BASE_URL:-${API_BASE_URL:-}}; VITE_API_PORT=${VITE_API_PORT:-${API_PORT:-}}; export PORT BASE_PATH VITE_API_BASE_URL VITE_API_PORT; pnpm --filter @workspace/admin run dev'
scripts.dev:member: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env.local; set +a; PORT=${PORT:-8081}; EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-${API_BASE_URL:-}}; export PORT EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL; pnpm --filter @workspace/gymapp run dev'
scripts.dev:member:web: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env.local; set +a; PORT=${PORT:-3100}; EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-${API_BASE_URL:-}}; EXPO_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=${EXPO_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY:-${CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY:-}}; export PORT EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL EXPO_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY; pnpm --filter @workspace/gymapp exec expo start --web --localhost --port ${PORT:-3100}'
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: sh -c 'API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} ADMIN_BASE_URL=${ADMIN_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4173/admin/} pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/admin-api-smoke.spec.ts'
scripts.test:e2e:ui: sh -c 'ADMIN_BASE_URL=${ADMIN_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4173/admin/} MEMBER_BASE_URL=${MEMBER_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3100/} pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
